issues.sample: The bike will no longer downshift reliably.   This jeopardizes the rider because the inability to select a lower gear to slow the motorcycle using engine braking and when arriving at a traffic light or an intersection that requires a lower gear to pull out from a stop safely into

narrative.headline: What 2022 Triumph Bonneville T100 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (100% of reports).
